family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

field_definitions.official_url: Official insurer or official plan page URL when verified publicly.
field_definitions.quote_or_application_url: Public quote, application, or buy path when verified publicly.
field_definitions.broker_url: Relevant broker or intermediary page retained when it materially adds discovery evidence.
field_definitions.policy_wording_or_pdf_url: Public policy wording, brochure, handbook, table of benefits, or similar PDF/public document URL when verified in this run.
field_definitions.source_set: Collected and derived public sources mapped to the candidate and marked for applicability to the candidate evidence entry.
field_definitions.evidence_entry_source_map: Source-id lists showing which collected sources are applicable to specific evidence roles within the candidate entry.
field_definitions.source_directness_classification: How directly the source reflects insurer-controlled source-of-truth material for discovery evidence in this run.
field_definitions.source_directness_justification: Brief explanation of why the source was classified as high, medium, or low directness.
field_definitions.evidence_entry_completeness_summary: Per-candidate discovery completeness classification derived from the source completeness audit, including the complete/partial/insufficient status, reason, and recorded evidence gaps.

source_directness_rubric.high: Official insurer-controlled quote/application paths and official policy wording, brochure, benefit-table, or similar plan documents.
source_directness_rubric.medium: Official insurer-controlled landing or marketing pages that are direct but less authoritative for exact eligibility or benefit details than quote or policy documents.
source_directness_rubric.low: Broker/intermediary pages or other indirect public sources that materially help discovery but are not primary insurer-controlled evidence.

url_verification_notes: This artifact is discovery-only and does not rank or recommend plans.
Null means not verified publicly in this run, not necessarily unavailable.
For some candidates, quote flows or policy documents are gated and therefore only the landing page URL could be captured.
Broker URLs are included only where they materially supplement or substitute for official public discovery evidence.

Synthetic source_set rows are allowed for verified quote/application paths or plan-document URLs that were captured outside the original shared source_refs array but still apply to the candidate evidence entry.
